summary: Decent recording of an enjoyable show with good weather vibes, though the reviewer prefers another version.
review: The reviewer describes this copy as "pretty good" and notes that the concert benefited from great weather, suggesting a pleasant live atmosphere. No specific songs or performance details are mentioned, and the reviewer indicates a preference for a different recording of the same show. Overall the tape is considered satisfactory but not exceptional.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, moderate‑rating review (3 stars) with limited detail; the show quality cannot be assessed and recording quality is only described as "pretty good," leading to an average overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a "pretty good copy" but provides no specifics on clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure; reviewer only mentions overall enjoyment and weather.
